name: RPlog_The_Cutting_Edge_Nasiri_Interview
title: The Cutting Edge: The Nasiri Interview
summary: The flamboyant holonet reporter Thurston arrives on Nar Shaddaa with his ESPO-disguised crew to interview Nasiri Gejalli, the Falleen power broker, in a lavish otherworldly garden. Escorted by Nasiri's curt gothic niece and chrome troopers, Thurston launches into a pointed interview about the Smuggler's Moon's reputation as a cesspool of slavery, crime, and excess. Nasiri counters smoothly, arguing that Hutt space merely refuses to hide the vices the civilized galaxy practices and profits from in secret, that the black market will exist somewhere regardless, and that he himself owns no slaves and simply advises Hutts on sound business. Thurston repeatedly twists Nasiri's words to paint Hutt space as the driving market behind slavery and the garden as obscene wealth built on nearby suffering. The two spar with veiled hostility before parting cordially, Thurston declaring he merely exposes truths while Nasiri wonders how the segment will be spun.
